purpose: Pawnshop operations app connected to live Google Sheets data.

inventory_sale.description: Mark inventory item as sold and write sale data back to Google Sheets.

loan_update.description: Update a pawn or debt after repayment or extension.

desired_new_direction.notes_for_chatgpt: Fill this section with the direction you want, for example: make the app more like a daily operations command center, reduce charts, prioritize actions due today, add customer messaging, or focus on inventory sales.

prompt: You are helping redesign my PawnTrack pawnshop app. Use this JSON as the current app context. Suggest a practical new direction, exact app screens, workflows, data fields, Google Sheets changes, database tables, AI commands, and a clean daily-use UI. Keep the result specific to pawnshop operations.
